changes.rscadd: Added Enlightened Centrism as a Patron option for the Divine Pantheon.
Centrist worshippers do not get healed by the Astratan greater healing miracle, but can still be resurrected.

changes.bugfix: Known/branded Heretics no longer get healed by healing miracles, to match excommunicated people.

changes.rscadd: Centrist worshippers can devote themselves to a sole patron through right-click interaction at a pantheon cross.

changes.code_imp: Changed the backend for set_patron to account for existing clerical powers.

changes.rscadd: Added Holy Fire enchantment and accompanying miracle.

changes.code_imp: Added helper procs for adding and removing verbs for the priest.

changes.bugfix: Fixed some misplaced parameters for weapon enchantments.
Priest can no longer recruit roles with existing cleric powers into church roles.
Fixed message spam when equipping/moving grandmaster weapons in hands.
